data.text: I have approved the budget increase for glow sticks and LED sunglasses for all participants. This adjustment will increase the **Participant Amenities budget by 12%**, resulting in a **2% increase to the total event budget**. This addition will significantly enhance the nighttime atmosphere of the Neon & Neighborhoods Marathon.

[Planner_With_Memory] Model End

I have approved the budget increase for glow sticks and LED sunglasses for all participants. This adjustment will increase the **Participant Amenities budget by 12%**, resulting in a **2% increase to the total event budget**. This addition will significantly enhance the nighttime atmosphere of the Neon & Neighborhoods Marathon.
